The NFL (National Football League) consists of 32 teams divided into two conferences: the AFC (American Football Conference) and the NFC (National Football Conference). The NFC Championship game is the final game of the NFC playoffs, with the winner going on to the Super Bowl. Next, "went for it on fourth down" is a specific term in American football. If a team doesn't have enough yards by the fourth down, they can either punt the ball to the opposing team or attempt a field goal. However, "going for it on fourth down" means the team decides to try to gain the necessary yards on the fourth down instead of punting or kicking a field goal.
